DP.058.0000:
The Badges that Pokémon Gyms give
you are a measure of a Trainer’s\r
worth.\f
By getting more Badges, you get to
buy more items in Poké Marts.
DP.058.0001:
The Poké Mart girls are so pretty,
they leave me tongue tied.\f
They sell all sorts of great items,
so I get even more flustered...
